old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-cy6c","title":"Fix ESP32-S3 Renode app execution","description":"Discovered by project-LICHEN-m5m1.8. Heltec V3 and T-Deck bridge/gateway plus Heltec puck produce linked ESP32-S3 ELFs, but the skeletal Renode model loads low-address segments into unmapped ranges and never reaches UART or protocol oracles. Replace or correct address mapping and required peripheral/radio modeling so canonical application ELFs execute faithfully. Also ensure the ARM builder has the packaging dependency needed after linking.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Canonical Heltec V3 and T-Deck bridge/gateway ELFs load without unmapped segment failures and reach app-specific late runtime plus independent protocol/radio oracles. 2. Heltec puck reaches beacon/TX oracle. 3. ESP image packaging completes without missing intelhex. 4. Exact commands, hashes, and logs are retained; skeletal surrogate behavior is not presented as faithful evidence.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:16:29.776797Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T18:16:29.776797Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-cy6c","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-m5m1.8","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:16:29.934492Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-cy6c","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:39:49.351752Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: All ESP32-S3 issues fixed: Renode model (memory map, peripherals), DTS (pinctrl, flash, timers, BT), Kconfig (stacks, LORA, provisioning, SLIP=n), code (SX1262 bridge, hal alignment), packaging (intelhex in pyproject.toml). ELFs load, reach late oracles, TX observed. Tests with west, Renode, readelf, harness passed. Children closed. Lane complete per parent. No other files touched.
